result.stdout:
Description:
  Utility to download a nuget package from the configured NuGet sources

Usage:
  NugetFetcher [options]

Options:
  --id <id>       The ID of the package to download
  --v <v>         The version of the package to download
  --o <o>         The name of the file to save the package to. Defaults to <packageId>.<packageVersion> if not specified.
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
